# SHA-256 digests of precedent / personal-identifier literals.
# One lowercased term per digest; cleartext is intentionally NOT stored here
# (self-doxxing avoidance, oss-publication-pii-guard §5). Detection logic
# lives in scripts/check_precedent.py (word n-gram hashing). To add a term,
# append sha256(lowercase(term)) — do not record the term itself.
01a32ee72c66812e7411563ef7a1ab7aed2485705fd0ae7471666a920cd48412
0435e77129cd8da3394d5166587ae604697ff0246c4fa202313dd4ab8c121c30
04361ea3d7d5f3e4d7e8f3aa130f825ebd85013b6f30c1bf97b8994a722444a3
09c580ab5b210992fb6cbffa64c998847fd510e354bbcf0844d6313ac7babb78
0ce0419bd53748ff045874b2cfb2f7a5bb7141140f68b7ee374d28877917ec69
2083116eabe5e022db08b36f3cbd2aa7dc5e4215e78b7f45bdfb30b1fd67048b
23e5179eff9f0b3218035060456f01a851789f7910bd05969fdd7aa591639323
